title: CricketIQ:Transforming Cricket Data into Fan Intelligence
tagline: Design an intelligent sports analytics platform thattransforms raw cricket data into engaging, actionable and easy-to-undestand insights
description: The solution should enhance the fan experience by converting match events, player performances, and historical statistics into interactive visualizations, predictions, and contextual analysis.

title: Beyond the Resume – AI-Powered Career Intelligence Platform
tagline: The platform should act as a career advisor rather than merely a job search engine
description: Design a career intelligence platform that combines job postings, candidate profiles, labor market trends, and career data to provide personalized insights that help individuals make smarter career decisions

title: SmartSpace – The AI Real Estate Companion
tagline: Design an AI-powered real estate platform that simplifies the home buying, selling, and renting process by providing personalized recommendations, market insights, and streamlined transactions.
description: The modern real estate ecosystem is highly fragmented. Individuals searching for homes, offices, rentals, or investment opportunities often face scattered information, biased recommendations, complex paperwork, and inefficient decision-making processes.
